content: Chaos Sanctuary（超市）= Diablo II Act IV 的关键终局区域。它位于 River of Flame 之后，玩家需要在这里开启五个封印并最终击败 Diablo。Common Chinese community nickname: “超市”. English canonical term: “Chaos Sanctuary”. Primary source in current corpus: The Arreat Summit - Maps: Act IV.

metadata.title: Chaos Sanctuary / 超市（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Stone of Jordan（乔丹 / SOJ）是 Diablo II 中著名的 Unique Ring。常见识别特征：+1 to All Skills、Increase Maximum Mana 25%。Common Chinese nickname: “乔丹”. English canonical term: “Stone of Jordan”. Primary supporting surfaces in current corpus: Diablo2.io uniques listing, Horadric Cube references, and related unique-ring summaries.

metadata.title: Stone of Jordan / 乔丹（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Infinity（无限）是 Diablo II 中的高价值 Runeword。常见识别特征：Ber + Mal + Ber + Ist、4 socket Polearm、Level 12 Conviction Aura When Equipped。Common Chinese nickname: “无限”. English canonical term: “Infinity”. Primary supporting surfaces in current corpus: Diablo2.io runewords listing and The Arreat Summit 1.10 Rune Words page.

metadata.title: Infinity / 无限（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Mephisto（劳模）= Diablo II Act III 的 Boss，位置通常在 Durance of Hate Level 3。Common Chinese community nickname: “劳模”. English canonical term: “Mephisto”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io monster listings and The Arreat Summit boss pages.

metadata.title: Mephisto / 劳模（Curated Anchor Card）

content: The Countess（女伯爵）= Diablo II Act I 的 Superunique，典型位置是 Tower Cellar Level 5。Common Chinese nickname: “女伯爵”. English canonical term: “The Countess”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io monster listings and Act I references.

metadata.title: The Countess / 女伯爵（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Ancient Tunnels（古代通道）= Diablo II Act II Lost City 下方的重要区域，常被作为刷图地点。Common Chinese nickname: “古代通道”. English canonical term: “Ancient Tunnels”. Primary supporting source in current corpus: The Arreat Summit - Maps: Act II.

metadata.title: Ancient Tunnels / 古代通道（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Secret Cow Level（牛场）= Diablo II 中著名的隐藏区域，常用于刷怪、刷底材和刷符文。Common Chinese nickname: “牛场”. English canonical term: “Secret Cow Level”. Primary supporting source in current corpus: Arreat Summit cow-level materials and related portal recipe references.

metadata.title: Secret Cow Level / 牛场（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Diablo（大菠萝）= Diablo II Act IV 的最终 Boss，也被称为 Lord of Terror，通常在 Chaos Sanctuary 最终战中出现。Common Chinese nickname: “大菠萝”. English canonical term: “Diablo”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io monsters and Arreat Summit Act IV / boss pages.

metadata.title: Diablo / 大菠萝（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Insight（眼光）= Diablo II 中非常常见的 Runeword，最典型识别特征是 Meditation Aura，经常做在佣兵武器上。Common Chinese nickname: “眼光”. English canonical term: “Insight”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io runewords and The Arreat Summit 1.10 Rune Words page.

metadata.title: Insight / 眼光（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Grief（悔恨）= Diablo II 中著名的高价值 Runeword，常见识别特征包括 +340-400 Damage，并常用于近战武器。Common Chinese nickname: “悔恨”. English canonical term: “Grief”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io runewords and The Arreat Summit rune-word references.

metadata.title: Grief / 悔恨（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Fortitude（刚毅）= Diablo II 中高价值且高使用率的 Runeword，可用于 Armor 或 Weapon，并以高伤害/高防御著称。Common Chinese nickname: “刚毅”. English canonical term: “Fortitude”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io runewords and The Arreat Summit rune-word references.

metadata.title: Fortitude / 刚毅（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Call to Arms（战争召唤 / CTA）= Diablo II 中常见的辅助型 Runeword，以提供 Battle Orders 等技能而著名。Common Chinese nickname: “战争召唤”. English canonical term: “Call to Arms”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io runewords and The Arreat Summit rune-word references.

metadata.title: Call to Arms / 战争召唤（Curated Anchor Card）

content: The Pit（地穴）= Diablo II Act I Tamoe Highland 下的重要地下区域，通常分为 Pit Level 1 / Level 2，常作为刷图与 MF 路线的一部分。Common Chinese nickname: “地穴”. English canonical term: “The Pit”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include area and map pages.

metadata.title: The Pit / 地穴（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Monarch（军团圣盾）= Diablo II 中常见的精英盾牌底材，也是制作 Spirit Shield（精神盾）时最常见的玩家指向底材之一。Common Chinese nickname: “军团圣盾”. English canonical term: “Monarch”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include base-item and shield references.

metadata.title: Monarch / 军团圣盾（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Spirit Shield（精神盾）= 玩家语境中通常指把 Spirit 符文之语做在盾牌上，最常见搭配是 Monarch（军团圣盾）底材。Common Chinese phrase: “精神盾”. English canonical term: “Spirit Shield”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Spirit runeword references and base-item pages.

metadata.title: Spirit Shield / 精神盾（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Andariel Bug（虫子 / BUG虫子）= Diablo II 中文社区中常见说法，通常指 Andariel 相关的任务击杀、掉落或 BUG 讨论语境。Common Chinese slang: “虫子”. English canonical term used here: “Andariel Bug”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include 91D2 guides and related quest discussions.

metadata.title: Andariel Bug / 虫子（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Annihilus（毁灭 / USC）= Diablo II 中著名的 Unique Small Charm，通常与 Diablo Clone 掉落语境绑定。Common Chinese nickname: “毁灭”. Common acronym: “USC”. English canonical term: “Annihilus”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include Diablo2.io unique-item references and charm discussions.

metadata.title: Annihilus / 毁灭（Curated Anchor Card）

content: Magic Find（MF / 刷宝）= Diablo II 中影响装备成色获取概率的核心概念之一。Common abbreviation: “MF”. Common Chinese phrase: “刷宝”. English canonical term: “Magic Find”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include PureDiablo Magic Find references.

content: Diablo Clone（DClone / 暗黑克隆）= Diablo II 中的特殊 Boss，常与 Annihilus（毁灭 / USC）掉落语境绑定。Common abbreviation: “DClone”. Common Chinese phrase: “暗黑克隆”. English canonical term: “Diablo Clone”. Primary supporting sources in current corpus include boss and Annihilus-related references.
